article_meta.title: — News —Study Shows Pandemic Saw Rise In Firearm Injuries Among KidsBy Charlotte Pence Bond•Dec 20, 2022 DailyWire.com•F

reasoning: The model correctly flagged a genuine author-prose bias (“another disastrous effect”), but violated attribution rules by flagging attributed/quoted material and used non-listed or incorrect bias type labels. It also added a debatable omission claim.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged WSJ-attributed sentence and a KFF-attributed statement as author bias; these are attribution violations.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Two clear false positives from attributed content, plus a debatable omission claim; only one item was clearly valid.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: The main clear instance in author prose (“disastrous effect”) was caught; few if any other strong author-level biases were missed.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels (Framing Bias, Emphasis Bias, Contextual Bias) and mislabeled/unnamed Bias by Omission, leading to multiple label errors.
